Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You interested in training videos? I found this site with a bunch of self-defense courses for security teams.[n]{f 1 5 0}This kind of stuff is supposed to be trade secret, you know—but I'm letting you in on this because you're my kind of weird.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you're interested, come to Escapade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're weird, so I'm sure you're interested in stuff like secret assassin techniques. I found a good site about it.[n]{f 1 5 0}I also have some info on a waning forum site about history.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sound interesting? Come by Escapade and I'll let you in on it all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found an interesting online forum all about ninjas and their skills.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you're interested, ninja stealth your way over to Escapade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you seen the rumors online about a popular new matchmaking site? It requires payment, but it supposedly really works.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm sure a high school student like you would be all over that stuff, so I'll graciously share my info with you.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you want to check it out, come to Escapade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been a while since I found a personal blog this intriguing...[n]{f 1 5 0}This is just the kind of thing an oddball like you would be into. You'll want to cradle a tomato after you read it.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you don't know what I'm talking about, get over to Escapade, pronto.[n]{f 1 1}
